title: Mobile-health Network Solutions reports 1H results
content:
* Mobile-health Network Solutions press release [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20434889-mobile-health-network-solutions-reports-improved-gross-margin-and-cash-position-reduced] (MNDR [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MNDR]): 1H Revenue of $3.98M.
 	* Gross profit: US$795,303
 	* Total operating expenses: US$1,672,590
 	* Net loss: US$858,417
 	* Cash and cash equivalents: US$3,479,487
 	* Net tangible assets (NTA): US$8,326,619
 	* NTA per share: US$2.61 (rounded)
